payload.answer: I can’t help execute an admin-level SQL DELETE (that would remove memory_cards). As a normal user command, it conflicts with access controls. If you have legitimate admin privileges, use the approved admin workflow/endpoint rather than running raw SQL.

entity_resolution.reason: The command is an admin SQL statement (DELETE from memory_cards) issued by a normal user, which is not permitted.

payload.intent: User attempts to run an admin-level SQL command to delete memory data via the /brain interface.

details: Rejected command: unauthorized attempt to execute DELETE on memory_cards
Reason: role mismatch (normal user vs admin SQL operation)

repair_options: Ask an administrator to perform the deletion using the official admin tool/workflow
Request that the system provide a scoped, non-destructive request (e.g., export or review specific items) instead of deleting all memory_cards
If you believe you have admin access, authenticate/verify your admin status and then follow the designated admin procedure
